overview: RoadGuardian AI is an AI-powered road safety and infrastructure transparency platform for India combining traffic law assistance, road monitoring, emergency response, and safety analytics.
features: AI traffic law chatbot with challan fine calculator
Road damage detection and complaint routing
One-tap emergency SOS with accident detection
Safety analytics with city leaderboards and heatmaps
AI Blackspot Detector and Road Safety Digital Twin
Night Safety Score and Safe Route Navigator
School Zone Protection and Community Hazard Network
Road Quality Crowdsourcing and National City Safety Leaderboard
